positive: A vibrant, retro-futuristic cityscape view from a high vantage point at sunset. The scene is dominated by stylized geometric architecture and floating vehicles, resembling Art Deco mixed with Vaporwave aesthetics. The main focal point is a stylized, minimalist silhouette of a majestic mountain range framing the city skyline. Use strong contrast, with deep indigo and cyan blues contrasting against warm gradients of orange, magenta, and gold in the sky. The composition must be clean, highly symmetric, and designed as a repeatable seamless print for apparel. Vector illustration style, sharp edges, neon glow accents, crisp lines, high saturation, perfect balance, central composition, suitable for t-shirt print.
negative: blur, grainy, fuzzy, text, watermark, logo, artifact, lowres, worst quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, signature, copyright, cartoon, sketch, graffiti, photorealistic, messy, cluttered
